data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

From 4/24 (Mon), the amount of rewards dropped in Bounty will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your student's skill!

🗓️Period: 4/24 (Mon) 19:00 – 5/1 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
